_doc: 果仁 indicator -> local provider field/expression + validated parity. Derived snapshot of guorn_local_field_mapping.md (CANONICAL). NON-FORMAL. Built from 果仁-parity ladder rungs 1-4 (2026-06-23).

conventions.display_lag: T-1 (signal date = trading day before the holding 开始日期), not the buy date
conventions.amount_to_yi: 成交额(亿元) = $amount / 1e5  ($amount is in 千元)
conventions.total_mv_unit: $total_mv is 万元; 果仁 总市值(亿) * 1e4 = 万元
conventions.bp_scale: equity(元)/total_mv(万元) -> *1e4 to match displayed BP
conventions.houfuquan: adjc = $close * $adj_factor; price RATIOs are 复权-base-invariant; raw close is wrong
conventions.single_quarter: $<field>_sq_q0 = latest single quarter; _sq_q4 = year-ago same quarter; TTM = sum(_sq_q0.._sq_q3); read via D.features (NOT raw pit_ledger)
conventions.pit_gate_timing: gate as-of rebalance day (lag-0); effective_date>disclosure STRICT (§3.2)

validated.note: PARENT equity (exc_min_int), NOT inc_min_int; residual = 总市值 2-dec display-round + equity PIT-boundary
$pe_ttm NOT $pe static (13.8% off); residual = price signal-day
numerator=股价振幅 NOT |1日涨幅| (aichat doc wrong); avg-of-ratios; residual ~0.86x = undocumented sub-detail
residual = N-day lookback window-membership counting (NOT data/复权/corp-action; window N=250 sharp min; no-corp-action subset equally off)
same root cause as 250日涨幅 (MA window-membership; no-corp-action subset equally off)

un_validatable.guorn: 股价振幅%当日成交额10日
un_validatable.reason: 果仁 displays 0.00 (true value ~2e-6 rounds to zero at 2 decimals); formula provably correct but parity meaningless

doc_corrections.correct: numerator = 股价振幅 (high-low)/prev_close, NOT |1日涨幅|

doc_corrections.says: 归属母公司股东权益合计/总市值

doc_corrections.correct: TOTAL net profit $n_income, not 归母 $n_income_attr_p
